title: Senior Business Development Manager at Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate Capital India
company: Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate Capital India

jsonLd.title: Senior Business Development Manager at Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate Capital India
jsonLd.description:
We at Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate Capital India are looking for an experienced Business Development Manager based out of Allahabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate Capital India:
Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate Capital India!
